list_info.科目英文名: English reading of medical record and literature

detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文病歷與文獻閱讀 (English reading of medical record and literature)	開課班級 : 護理二	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 黃惠滿	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course enables students 1. To understand the features and importance of medical records. 2. To understand the importance on reading nursing English literature. 3. Familiar with the key points of medical records and nursing English literature in each subject. 4. Able to read the medical records of each department's in hospital. 5. Can use the reading skills of medical records to collect and analyze case health data. 6. Accomplish group presentation for medical records and nursing English literature.  


2.教學綱要
This course is taught in English. It is designed to allow students to learn the common terminology of medical records in the hospital systems. Teacher will take the clinical record as an example to provide reading material for students. Students will be familiar with the medical-related English words which are commonly used in clinical field. In order to improve professional literature reading ability, the teacher will also introduce related nursing journals and online resources. By doing so, It is expected that students could have a life-long learning literacy.

In order to closely integrate teaching materials and teaching strategies and maximize students' learning efficiency to achieve
students' learning goals, The teacher will implement the following teaching strategies:
1. Closely integrate teaching materials and teaching strategies in the course preparation process
2. Case teaching method
3. Interrogative learning method
4. Cooperative learning method
5. Diversified teaching strategies and multiple assessments

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Midterm written test 25% Final written test 25% Quiz 15% Class participation 5% Group written report & oral presentation 30%  
Guideline 1. 分組: 於第3週確定修課學生名單時開始分組，一班分6組。小老師於 112年2月25日5pm前繳交全班同學分組名單至黃惠滿信箱。 2. 請每組同學針對老師指定之臨床個案病歷，進行全文翻譯；並從病歷中 收集個案健康之相關資料，列出個案至少一個現存或潛在的健康問題。 (1).第四章第一節(一般) (2).第四章第二節(心外) (3).第四章第三節(骨科) (4).第四章第四節(整外) (5).第三章第五節(腫瘤) (6).第三章第一節(心內) 3.翻譯word檔: 一句英文一句中文翻譯，請注意英文拼字要正確。 4.submit PPT to teacher one week before oral Presentation. 5.Tel：082-313717 ; Email: x2156@nqu.edu.tw 出席課程要求 1.出席所有課程，請假請遵守學校規定並檢附證明、事先寄信告知授課老師。 2.聯絡方式：黃惠滿老師分機 3717; x2156@nqu.edu.tw 3.上課請遵行上課禮儀，勿吃東西。 4.全學期請假（包括所有假別超過12小時，學期時數1/3本科成績以不及格 論）。 5.曠課一節課扣1分，本項扣分無上限。 6.請假（喪假或公假除外）一節課扣0.25分，本項扣分無上限。 7.遲到或早退（點名後遲到或早退＜15分鐘）一次扣 0.25分，本項扣分無上限。 8.依據學生上課表現給予分數加減，最高加減總分4分。 
70% English teaching
